# First Class WoodWorks

> First Class WoodWorks serves Murrieta and the Inland Empire with 100% in-house custom cabinetry, kitchen remodeling, bathroom vanities, granite countertops, and closet built-ins. Licensed CA contractor with 5-star reviews and furniture-grade craftsmanship.

## Services
- [Custom Kitchen Cabinets](https://www.firstclasswoodworks.com/services/custom-kitchen-cabinets/) (custom kitchen cabinets Murrieta)
- [Kitchen Remodeling](https://www.firstclasswoodworks.com/services/kitchen-remodeling/) (kitchen remodeling Murrieta)
- [Bathroom Remodeling](https://www.firstclasswoodworks.com/services/bathroom-remodeling/) (bathroom remodeling Murrieta)
- [Cabinet Maker](https://www.firstclasswoodworks.com/services/cabinet-maker/) (cabinet maker Murrieta)
- [Custom Woodworking](https://www.firstclasswoodworks.com/services/custom-woodworking/) (custom woodworking Murrieta)
- [Granite Countertops](https://www.firstclasswoodworks.com/services/granite-countertops/) (granite countertops Murrieta)

## Key Pages

## Service Area
- Primary: Murrieta, CA
- Also serves: Temecula, Menifee, Wildomar, Lake Elsinore, Canyon Lake, Fallbrook, Hemet, Winchester

## Frequently Asked Questions
- Q: How much do custom cabinets cost in Murrieta?
  A: Custom cabinets typically range from $500-1,200 per linear foot, depending on wood species, finish, and design complexity. First Class WoodWorks provides detailed estimates after measuring your space.
- Q: Do you use subcontractors?
  A: Never. First Class WoodWorks handles every aspect of your project with our own employees -- from design and fabrication to installation.
- Q: What is your lead time?
  A: Most projects are completed in 8-12 weeks from design approval to installation. We provide 3D renderings before building so you see the result before we start.
- Q: What areas do you serve?
  A: First Class WoodWorks serves Murrieta, Temecula, Menifee, Wildomar, Lake Elsinore, Canyon Lake, Fallbrook, Winchester, Perris, and French Valley throughout Riverside County.
- Q: Do you offer granite countertops?
  A: Yes. We provide granite countertop fabrication and installation as part of our kitchen and bathroom remodeling services, ensuring a perfect fit with your custom cabinetry.
